falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average by 3.5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend reversal, contradicting the HOLD signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would signal extreme overbought conditions, invalidating the HOLD by proving the pattern is not a bottom but a topping reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX volatility index drops below 12 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained low volatility would contradict the 85% similarity to the volatile bottom_2024_aug pattern, proving the current call is not aligned with historical precedent.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
